# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_cluster (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `cluster_name` (String) The cluster name to use for cluster creation.
- `fingerprint` (String) The fingerprint of the cluster master when joining the cluster.
- `link0` (String) The first IP address to use for cluster communication.
- `link1` (String) The second IP address to use for cluster communication.
- `master_api_password` (String) Specify the password to authenticate with the master node. Uses the api_password parameter if not specified.
- `master_ip` (String) The IP address of the cluster master when joining the cluster.
- `state` (String) Possible module state to perform the required steps within the Proxmox VE API.

### Read-Only

- `cluster` (String) The name of the cluster that was created or joined.
